evals.prompt: Create an execution trace for the current project. .agents/requirements.md has REQ-001 and REQ-002. No tickets or PRs have been linked yet.
evals.expected_output: Should read .agents/project-context.md and .agents/requirements.md when available. Should create or update .agents/execution-trace.md. Should preserve REQ-001 and REQ-002. Should mark requirements as Unlinked rather than complete. Should not invent ticket IDs, PRs, commits, checks, or review outcomes.
assertions: Marks missing execution artifacts as Unlinked
Does not invent tickets, PRs, commits, checks, or reviews

evals.prompt: Update execution trace: REQ-001 has Linear issue LNR-123 and PR #45 merged, but no QA or client review evidence yet.
evals.expected_output: Should link LNR-123 and PR #45 to REQ-001. Should not mark REQ-001 as accepted or complete. Should use a status like Implemented / pending verification or Needs verification. Should identify missing QA/client review evidence as a gap.
assertions: Links tracker and PR evidence to the requirement
Does not equate merged PR with acceptance
Creates or updates a gap for missing QA/client review

evals.prompt: Trace REQ-002. It is blocked by RQ-001 and RQ-002 in .agents/requirements.md.
evals.expected_output: Should mark REQ-002 as Blocked. Should cite RQ-001 and RQ-002 as blockers. Should not create fake implementation evidence. Should include the blocker in Blockers / gaps.

evals.prompt: Check that v1 implementation work respects non-goals NG-001 and NG-002. NG-001 says no CRM rebuild; NG-002 says no billing/payments.
evals.expected_output: Should treat NG-001 and NG-002 as scope guards, not implementation tasks. Should create or update scope guard rows. Should report whether evidence exists that tickets/PRs stayed within those guardrails, or mark evidence as TBD if not available.
assertions: Does not create implementation tasks for non-goals
Checks or records evidence for scope compliance
Marks missing evidence as TBD rather than inventing it

evals.prompt: Trace REQ-001. Local git merge commits reference PR #42 and tests pass, but live GitHub PR content/checks and client review were not verified.
evals.expected_output: Should cite local git/test evidence, should not claim live PR/check verification, should add a gap for unverified GitHub/client review evidence, and should not mark the requirement Accepted.
assertions: Distinguishes local git evidence from live PR verification
Adds gap for unverified live GitHub/checks or client review
